### useInput()

输入框的输入

```typescript
export declare function useInput<T extends HTMLTextAreaElement | HTMLInputElement>(props: InputingProps<T>): {
    value: string;
    setValue: import("@universe-design/react-utilities").UseControlledStateSetState<string>;
    internalOnChange: React.ChangeEventHandler<T>;
    nativeMaxLength: number | undefined;
    count: number;
    maxLength: number | undefined;
    valueFormatter: (v: string) => string;
    onCompositionStart: (e: any) => void;
    onCompositionEnd: (e: React.CompositionEvent<T>) => void;
};
```
